case_title: NOAH LEE MARGETTS VS. MXB BATTERY OPERATIONS LP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARGETTS, NOAH LEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MXB BATTERY OPERATIONS LP $5,625.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,625.00, $187.50 X 30= $5,625.00 PER L.C. 203 AGES DUE OCT. 15TH. NOV E-MAIL CONFIRMS NON PAYMENT. IT IS EMPLOYERS RESPONSIBILITY TO HAVE PAPERWORK PRIOR TO EMPLOYMENT. L.C. 203.1 PENALTY NOT AWARDED. CHECK WAS NOT NSF. EXTRA HOURS CLAIM NOT AWARDED.
